sceneData.title: Introduction
sceneData.imagePrompt: A sleek Canon EOS 1500D camera rotating slowly on a pedestal, catching a single ray of cinematic light against a dark, minimalist background. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.videoPrompt: best camer with 4k quality. Add subtle camera motion (slow push-in, pan, reveal).
sceneData.voiceLine: Unlock your creative potential with the Canon EOS 1500D from New Org.

sceneData.voiceLine: Capture the world in breathtaking detail with stunning 4K video quality.

sceneData.voiceLine: Don't just record moments, sculpt them with ultra-smooth 120 frames per second slow-motion.

sceneData.imagePrompt: Canon EOS 1500D Details: DSLR. Feature Canon EOS 1500D naturally in the frame. Keep composition vertical 9:16 and premium.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A fast, smooth zoom-in effect on the previous landscape, focusing on a lone tree on a distant mountain peak, showing the incredible power of the 30x zoom. The final image is crystal clear.
sceneData.voiceLine: ...to the finest details, with a powerful 30x zoom.

scenes.voiceScript: Unlock your creative potential with the Canon EOS 1500D from New Org. Capture the world in breathtaking detail with stunning 4K video quality. Don't just record moments, sculpt them with ultra-smooth 120 frames per second slow-motion. What you see is what you get. The vibrant, true-to-life screen ensures perfect color accuracy every time. Get closer to the action than ever before. From expansive landscapes... to the finest details, with a powerful 30x zoom. It's professional power, made incredibly simple for beginners. Elevate your photography. Discover the Canon EOS 1500D at New Org today.
scenes.thumbnailPrompt: Dramatic hero shot of the Canon EOS 1500D DSLR camera on a dark, minimalist surface. A single cinematic light source highlights its texture and form. The lens is pointed towards the viewer. Hyper-realistic, eye-catching.
scenes.globalVisualStyle: Sleek and modern product showcase, cinematic lighting with deep shadows and soft highlights, shallow depth of field, high-end tech aesthetic, shot in a minimalist studio setting with a dark background. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
